clients.aboutMe: I am a software engineer in Google Mumbai. I love hiking, playing board games, and spending time with family. Looking for an independent, caring partner with shared values.

notes.author: Karan Johar
notes.text: Rohan is very clear about wanting a vegetarian partner. Prefers someone in Mumbai or open to relocating. Career-oriented but values family highly.

clients.aboutMe: Work in consulting, which keeps me busy but I make sure to travel and paint on weekends. Looking for an ambitious, broad-minded partner who respects career goals and loves to travel.

notes.author: Karan Johar
notes.text: Ananya is open to relocating anywhere in India or abroad for the right partner. High focus on educational background (prefers IIT/IIM/Ivy League graduates).

matchHistory.emailDraft:
Subject: Introducing Mayank, Your 95% Match

Dear Ananya,

I am thrilled to introduce you to Mayank, a 32-year-old Pediatrician at Zomato, residing in Delhi, with an impressive income of 104 LPA. As your dedicated matchmaker, I have carefully curated this match, considering various aspects of your preferences and expectations.

Mayank stands out as an exceptional candidate, and I'd like to highlight two compelling reasons why I believe he could be an ideal match for you. Firstly, his strong financial stability and successful career align perfectly with your aspirations for a secure and prosperous life. Secondly, the fact that you both reside in the same city, Delhi, and share similar dietary habits as non-vegetarians, lays a solid foundation for a compatible lifestyle and social life.

With a match score of 95%, I am confident that Mayank and you could form a deep and meaningful connection. Our comprehensive analysis has also revealed a moderate values compatibility, favorable astrological alignment, and a shared religious background as Hindus.

I would be delighted to share Mayank's full biodata with you, providing a more detailed insight into his personality, interests, and values. If you're interested, we could also schedule a call to discuss this match further and answer any questions you may have.

Would you like to review Mayank's full biodata or schedule a call to explore this exciting opportunity?

Best regards,
Karan Johar, Senior Matchmaker
The Date Crew

clients.aboutMe: Director of Product at a fintech in Bangalore/Hyd. Family oriented, loves playing tennis and investing. Looking for a partner who is warm, values-oriented, and ready to settle down in Hyderabad.

notes.author: Karan Johar
notes.text: Vikram is Manglik and his family takes Kundali matching very seriously (High importance). Must check Manglik alignment or score compatibility.

clients.aboutMe: Pediatrician at Apollo. Passionate about child health, classical music, and traveling. Looking for a compassionate partner, preferably a doctor or corporate professional, who shares similar values.

notes.author: Karan Johar
notes.text: Priya is a doctor and would highly prefer a fellow doctor or a highly qualified professional. Christian profiles are preferred but she is open.

clients.aboutMe: Marketing Manager in Pune. Fun loving, fond of road trips, Punjabi music, and home-cooked food. Looking for a simple, family-oriented girl, preferably Sikh, to join our joint family.

notes.author: Karan Johar
notes.text: Prefers a Sikh girl who is family-oriented and comfortable living in a joint family system. Diet preferences are flexible.

clients.aboutMe: Running my own design studio in Ahmedabad. Creative, love listening to instrumental music, and visiting heritage sites. Looking for a Gujarati partner, well settled, with a respectful and supportive mindset.

notes.author: Karan Johar
notes.text: Family is strictly vegetarian (and no smoking/drinking). Horoscope matching is crucial. Patel matching is highly preferred.

pool.aboutMe: Simple, down-to-earth, and family-oriented. Working in tech but also love photography and storytelling. Looking for a partner who is a friend first.
Ambitious, creative, and passionate about life. I love exploring new cities, learning different languages, and practicing yoga. Looking for a supportive partner.
An optimistic individual with a modern outlook, yet deeply rooted in cultural values. I enjoy running, reading non-fiction, and spending quality time with family.
Independent and passionate about what I do. I love staying active, cooking Indian food, and deep conversations over coffee. Seeking an emotionally mature partner.
A bubbly, empathetic, and independent woman. I love my career but equally value family warmth. Passionate about art, traveling, and good books.
I would describe myself as a blend of traditional values and modern thinking. I enjoy classical dance, baking, and playing board games with friends.
An optimistic individual with a modern outlook, yet deeply rooted in cultural values. I enjoy running, reading non-fiction, and spending quality time with family.
I'm a goal-oriented and warm person who believes in balancing career ambitions with family life. I enjoy weekend treks, listening to music, and exploring new cafes.
An easygoing person who appreciates the simple things in life. I love cooking, playing acoustic guitar, and spending time outdoors. Seeking compatibility, respect, and love.
